name: dotdrop
description: Installs dotdrop (deadc0de6/dotdrop) — a dotfile manager with profile-based deployment. Supports multiple profiles per host, templating, and actions. Used by fork-sync-all to manage per-repo-type Incus/blincus template profiles.

version.description: dotdrop version to install via pip ('latest' installs the current PyPI release).

repo.description: Optional dotdrop repository URL to clone and deploy on container start.

profile.description: dotdrop profile to deploy after cloning the repo. Defaults to hostname if blank.
